author: Pete752
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmedabout an hour agoFIOSlikes thisReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Pete752 onabout an hour agoIn that Bournemouth training video I linked yesterday, you can all of those concepts outlined by the article shared by FIOS.He practically trains with the players on the pitch. His training is also geared for organised chaos and creating space to go for goal. No useless sideways passing even in training.Small pitches in training where space is at a premium and the emphasis is on manufacturing space in a 8 move passing sequence to get a shot off on goal for example.One thing is for sure, we are going to be good to watch next season. No more soporific games from us unlike under Slot who tried his best to deliver an insomnia cure without the help of chemicals.
